programme.title: Shoresy

programme.title: Secret Headquarters

programme.title: Rocky II

programme.title: The Housemaid
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, a young woman becomes a live-in maid for a wealthy couple who harbor sinister secrets.

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

programme.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
programme.desc: Deadpool's peaceful existence comes crashing down when the Time Variance Authority recruits him to help safeguard the multiverse. He soon unites with his would-be pal, Wolverine, to complete the mission and save his world from an existential threat.

programme.title: The Players
programme.desc: Summer. 1994. Emily is cast as the youngest member of an avant garde theatre production. She is immediately entranced by the bohemian lives of her fellow actors and feels like she has found a surrogate family, but as the lines between artistic and personal relationships blur, Emily becomes trapped in the complex power dynamics within the group.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: A Tale of Three Letters

programme.title: Elli and Her Monster Team
programme.desc: A homeless ghost seeking belonging at a Ghost Train draws unwanted outside attention, forcing her and its monster residents to embark on a quest to save their home and her chance at finding family.

programme.title: Minari
programme.desc: A Korean American family moves to an Arkansas farm in search of its own American dream. Amidst the challenges of this new life in the strange and rugged Ozarks, they discover the undeniable resilience of family and what really makes a home.

programme.title: Goldfinger
programme.desc: Special agent 007 (Sean Connery) comes face to face with one of the most notorious villains of all time, and now he must outwit and outgun the powerful tycoon to prevent him from cashing in on a devious scheme to raid Fort Knox -- and obliterate the world's economy.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Recipe for Romance
programme.desc: Sari's big plans get derailed when Gabe opens a bakery next door to her family's coffee shop. This launches a prank war to end all prank wars, bringing Sari and Gabe together in a story of love, family, community and delicious pastries.

programme.title: Under the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Two crabs embark on an epic journey to get home after a storm sweeps them away. Their courage soon unites their families, paving the way for great summers to come.

programme.title: Border Hunters
programme.desc: In Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, a fentanyl overdose claims the lives of an American youth and a paramedic, drawing the U.S. ambassador into a desperate mission to dismantle the cartels. When former spy Abraham Woodhill enlists imprisoned ex-operative Jake Byrne, a violent, high-stakes game unfolds across jungles, villages and cartel strongholds.

programme.title: Drive Back Home
programme.desc: In the winter of 1970, a cantankerous, small town plumber from rural New Brunswick, must drive his beat-up work truck 1000 miles to Toronto to get his estranged, gay brother out of jail after being arrested for having sex in a public park. The two men are then forced to drive back home together at the behest of their hard-nosed mother before they kill each other.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Noah and Megan find a long-buried corpse in their parents' basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating web of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.title: In a Violent Nature
programme.desc: When a group of teens takes a locket from a collapsed fire tower in the woods, they unwittingly resurrect the rotting corpse of Johnny, a vengeful spirit spurred on by a horrific 60-year-old crime. The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.
